pr.title:
Non-record: Knowledge Distillation — A Negative
  Result (val_bpb=1.1553)

output.summary: Cached teacher logits for soft KL distillation but the lookup overhead offsets any gain, leaving the student tied with the hard-label baseline even after extended runs.
techniques: -Cached teacher top-32 logits to avoid online inference
-Compared hard vs soft distillation mixing ratios
-Ran extended 2h sweep to track convergence and warmdown effects
